dialogue_island_4_intro: Ehem, enter the realm, for thou shall see, what one can do if one graduates from CpE.

elements_level_1_career_software_enginee.title: Software Engineer
elements_level_1_career_software_enginee.description: I design and develop software systems and applications using programming and algorithms.

elements_level_1_career_hardware_enginee.title: Hardware Engineer
elements_level_1_career_hardware_enginee.description: I design and develop efficient, reliable computer hardware like processors, circuit boards, and memory devices.

elements_level_1_career_embedded_systems.title: Embedded Systems Engineer
elements_level_1_career_embedded_systems.description: I create software that runs on real-time hardware devices like IoT gadgets or automotive systems.

elements_level_1_career_network_engineer.title: Network Engineer / Systems Administrator
elements_level_1_career_network_engineer.description: I manage computer networks and servers, ensuring secure and uninterrupted connectivity.

elements_level_1_career_cybersecurity_en.title: Cybersecurity Analyst / Engineer
elements_level_1_career_cybersecurity_en.description: I protect systems and networks from cyber threats.

elements_level_1_career_ai_ml_engineer.title: AI / Machine Learning Engineer
elements_level_1_career_ai_ml_engineer.description: I develop intelligent and data-driven algorithms.

elements_level_1_career_data_engineer.title: Data Analyst / Engineer
elements_level_1_career_data_engineer.description: I collect and analyze data to produce meaningful insights.

elements_level_1_career_robotics_enginee.title: Robotics Engineer
elements_level_1_career_robotics_enginee.description: I design and program robots for precision tasks.

elements_level_1_career_firmware_enginee.title: Firmware Engineer
elements_level_1_career_firmware_enginee.description: I write low-level hardware-aware software that directly interfaces with devices.

feedback_level_1_conclusion: Now that you have seen it all, CpE is amazing isn’t it?
It combines several knowledge and skill sets from related career paths.
It provides broad work opportunities and competitive salaries.
dialogue_island_4_ending: Thank you for exploring this journey with me.
I hope you had fun and learned more about CpE!
